positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized neo-art deco illustration of a crescent moon embracing a cluster of bioluminescent tropical florals and stylized cosmic fauna. The design must feature strong, clean silhouettes with minimal gradients, relying on high contrast and defined color blocking. Use a palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, muted gold, and soft emerald green. Composition must be perfectly centered, designed for repetition or placement on fabric. The aesthetic should evoke a sense of mystical wonder and luxurious symmetry, suitable for textile printing. Studio lighting, vector graphic feel, maximalist symmetry, clean lines, 8K illustration.
